subcodes.first_line: O assured believer! Your letter was perused, and your aspiration is worthy of praise and deserving of acceptance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومنه موقنه نامه تو قرائت گردید و آرزوی تو سزاوار ستایش است و شایان شمول
subcodes.subjects: @power of imagination; thought; right intention, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
